offer: For specialty subcontractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inaccurate estimations cause lost contracts. We provide a streamlined bidding tool instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Inaccurate bidding leading to lost contracts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for specialty subcontractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on bidding tools
Direct message 20-50 subcontractors with demo video
Share insights in community forums for contractors
try_it: Let users try simple bid creation interface and cost estimation calculator on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing bid data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
